explanation.patient_text_preview: Patient phenotypes: Apathy; Generalized hypotonia; Death in infancy; Hyperammonemia; Cerebral edema; Neonatal death; Feeding difficulties
explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: developmental and epileptic encephalopathy, 40 Description: Any early infantile epileptic encephalopathy in which the cause of the disease is a mutation in the GUF1 gene. Phenotypes: Reduced eye contact; Seizure; Hypotonia; Lethargy; Spasticity; Choreoathetosis; Spastic tetraparesis; Myoclo
